相关PoC:
Patch-management-: Enterprise Patch Management Scenario – "Critical Patch Response for Financial Systems" Background You are the IT Administrator for a multinational financial services company that operates across India, the US, and Europe. A critical vulnerability (Ex: CVE-2025-4321) - must identify, approve, and prepare for patch deployment within 48 hours.
